data.body: G3 container coverage audit (parent WS-EVAL-EXISTING vs this child + full sibling roster): clean. This child 7402 partially-covers parent AC3 — it delivers the context-injection solver + stubbed/fixture repo tools that make the 3 agentic reviewers (verify_completion/review_ticket/scan_spec) runnable deterministically, plus the fixture corpus + label adjudication; the run_eval()/Inspect-wiring half of AC3 is covered by sibling 4569. No parent acceptance criterion is left uncovered by the union of children.
